 Content-Disposition: inline
 
 I forgot to remove to PORTREVISION tag in the previous patch.
 
 Here is the new patch.
 
 Andras
 
 --MP_/K839upYUd_sV4Xe_r41h7J2
 Content-Type: text/plain; name=patch.txt
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=patch.txt
 
 --- Makefile	2010-02-20 10:08:25.000000000 +0100
 +++ Makefile	2010-02-20 10:08:32.000000000 +0100
 @@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	aaphoto
 -PORTVERSION=	0.33
 -PORTREVISION=	1
 +PORTVERSION=	0.34
  CATEGORIES=	graphics
  MASTER_SITES=	http://log69.com/downloads/
  DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_sources_v${PORTVERSION}
 
 --MP_/K839upYUd_sV4Xe_r41h7J2--
 
 --Sig_/OQaAb60hUW6N8OAFZXlAPqo
